instructions: Always load relevant skills for this project. Key skills are in ~/.agents/skills/: supabase, supabase-postgres-best-practices, stripe-best-practices, stripe-projects, upgrade-stripe, vercel-react-best-practices, tailwind-design-system, nextjs-app-router-patterns, shadcn, zustand, resend, find-skills. For detailed project rules, see AGENTS.md.

security: Never use 'any' type - TypeScript strict mode enabled
Never log secrets, API keys, or user credentials
Always use server client for mutations, browser client for reads
Validate all inputs with Zod schemas
Use parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection
Validate Stripe webhook signatures before processing
Never commit secrets - use .env files only
validation: All functions must have explicit return types
scalability: Max 5 scores per user - auto-delete oldest
One score per user per date (unique constraint)
privacy: Never expose user emails in client-side responses
Use RLS policies to restrict data access
reliability: Never use setTimeout for critical logic
Always verify subscription status before granting access
performance: Never use React useEffect for Server Components
Use React Server Components for data fetching
Optimize images with Next.js Image component

required-checks: pnpm lint - must pass before commit
pnpm typecheck - must pass before commit
pnpm build - must succeed before deploy
